creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-02-09 12:59:00 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    x11-wm               Makefile 
  Added files:
    x11-wm/antiwm        Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    x11-wm/antiwm/files  patch-Makefile 
  Log:
  AntiWM is a small and simple window manager with a focus on
  productivity and utility. Inspired by ratpoison, AntiWM is
  keyboard driven and handles all windows fullscreen.
  
  WWW:    http://sourceforge.net/projects/antiwm
  
  PR:             ports/131246
  Submitted by:   Dennis Herrmann <adox at mcx2.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.238     +1 -0      ports/x11-wm/Makefile
  1.1       +38 -0     ports/x11-wm/antiwm/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/x11-wm/antiwm/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +47 -0     ports/x11-wm/antiwm/files/patch-Makefile (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/x11-wm/antiwm/pkg-descr (new)
